metadata.placeholder_status: Typologies use documented demo placeholder district values, not authoritative NFHS findings.
metadata.selection: Highest silhouette for valid k=3..6; smallest k wins within 1e-12.
metadata.standardization: Population z-scores across included demo districts.

typologies.description: Higher-than-average overweight and lower-than-average stunting, severe stunting, underweight, wasting, severe wasting, and anemia among the included demo districts.
typologies.label: High overweight, low stunting, low severe stunting, low underweight, low wasting, low severe wasting, low anemia

typologies.description: Higher-than-average underweight, wasting, and severe wasting among the included demo districts.
typologies.label: High underweight, High wasting, High severe wasting

typologies.description: Higher-than-average stunting, severe stunting, and anemia and lower-than-average overweight among the included demo districts.
typologies.label: High stunting, High severe stunting, High anemia, low overweight
